---
title: "Testing perceivers' accuracy and accuracy awareness when forming personality impressions from faces"
authors: "Jaeger, B., Sleegers, W. W. A., Stern, J., Penke, L., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2024
date: 2024-01-01
pub-journal: "European Journal of Personality"
volume: "1–21"
doi: "10.1177/08902070231225728"
pdf: "assets/papers/2024/jaegeretal2024.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
